definition:
1. an alliance offensive and defensive  (opposite to an ἐπιμαχία, defensive) , (Herdotus Historicus), etc.: συμμαχίαν ποιεῖσθαι πρός τινα (Herdotus Historicus); τινί (Thucydides) 
2. generally, the duty of an ally , (Aeschulus Tragicus) 
3. = τὸ συμμαχικόν, the body of allies , (Herdotus Historicus): also, the country of one's allies , (Thucydides) 
4. an allied  or auxiliary force , (Thucydides) (ML)
